title: Agrocord Modpack
body:
## The Official Modpack for Agro's Discord Server!

The Agrocord Minecraft server is a whitelisted SMP, built on top of Fabulously Optimized, and with a community-centric view in mind. From new biomes to explore, to new mobs to befriend or befoe, cosmetics for the fashion-driven, vanilla features rebalancing and much more! 

It relies also on two custom-built mods ([Agro's Fancy Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/agros-fancy-fixes) and [Magmaphile](https://modrinth.com/mod/magmaphile))!

This pack was developed **purely** for the Agrocord Discord Server. As such, any updates, changes, additions and removals will be made with the purpose of changing the SMP experience. 

For a full mod list, see below.


<details>
<summary>Mods:</summary>
  
- [ActuallyHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/sUbuUC7R) [1\.1\.1\.1] by wendall911 (actuallyharvest\-1\.21\.1\-1\.1\.1\.1\-FABRIC\.jar)

Note: This pack relies on **Mod Menu Helper** and **Chat Reporting Helper**, both features derived from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/). Additionally, it bundles very lightly modified versions of **Xerca's** [**Joy of Painting**](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting) and **[Better Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-enchanting)**, both of which license compliant.

<hr>
<h2>Looking for a Modded SMP Developer/Manager? Reach out!</h2>

Most of my experience as a Minecraft Modder comes from setting up, hosting and managing Minecraft servers for friends, as well as developing context-specific mods for said servers. <br>
Recently, I've taken a liking for providing this service professionally. <br>
[Agro's Fancy Fixes ]() and [Magmaphile]() are two such examples - both of which made entirely for a [content creator's modpack](), hosted on a server managed by me.<br><br>
If you'd like to start your own SMP, be it for friends or a large community, and either want to <b>delegate the boring, menial tasks of setting it up and managing a server</b>, or want consulting/assistance from someone <b>experienced in handling modpacks, mod conflicts, and nuances of modded Minecraft</b>, I can help you with it!

You can contact me through the following:
<br>Email - `malory@onenetbeyond.org`
<br>Discord - `maloryware`
